metadata.title: How a language model adds two numbers it was never taught to add
metadata.topic: The parallel-heuristic addition circuit inside a language model
metadata.purpose: The model factors addition into parallel approximate channels — a coarse magnitude estimate and a modular last-digit fact — each imprecise alone, but whose intersection is a single number.
metadata.clock: narration (Kokoro am_onyx) — master clock; conform each beat to measured audio
metadata.prerequisites: place value, last-digit/modular arithmetic, features as directions
metadata.exclusions: graph-is-a-hypothesis-not-a-transcript (top-level carded), transcoder mechanics, feature-labeling methodology
metadata.visual_object: Two converging pathways — a "magnitude ≈ 90" cloud and a "last digit = 5" ring — meeting at 95.
metadata.hook: The model has no adder and no carry algorithm, yet returns exact sums — the graph shows it triangulating the answer from two rough guesses.

beats.narration_text: For 36 + 59, one set of features estimates the magnitude ("the answer is around 90-ish") while a separate feature fires on "ends in 6" plus "ends in 9" → "ends in 5"; the two paths meet and pin the answer to exactly 95.
beats.scaffold_note: from Key case — cold open on the concrete instance

beats.narration_text: Exact addition should need a carry procedure the model doesn't have; how does combining a fuzzy magnitude with a last-digit fact land on the precise sum?
The model has no adder and no carry algorithm, yet returns exact sums — the graph shows it triangulating the answer from two rough guesses.
The model factors addition into parallel approximate channels — a coarse magnitude estimate and a modular last-digit fact — each imprecise alone, but whose intersection is a single number.
beats.visual: Two converging pathways — a "magnitude ≈ 90" cloud and a "last digit = 5" ring — meeting at 95.
beats.scaffold_note: the resolving mechanism; orbits the visual object

beats.narration_text: The model factors addition into parallel approximate channels — a coarse magnitude estimate and a modular last-digit fact — each imprecise alone, but whose intersection is a single number.
